opinion.h: CLINTON v. JOSHUA HENDY CORP., 364 U.S. 292 (1960)
CLINTON v. JOSHUA HENDY CORP. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE NINTH CIRCUIT. No. 59, Misc. Decided October 10, 1960.
opinion.p: 364 U.S. 292 CEPERO v. PUERTO RICO ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE SOUTHERN DISTRICT OF NEW YORK. No. 98, Misc. Decided October 10, 1960.
364 U.S. 292 WACHTEL v. NEW YORK. APPEAL FROM THE APPELLATE DIVISION OF THE SUPREME COURT OF NEW YORK, SECOND JUDICIAL DEPARTMENT. No. 144, Misc. Decided October 10, 1960.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
